title: Meta AR engine
content: - MIXED Reality News reported on the advancements of AR technology with the release of Meta's AR engine which, when released, intends to build a large-scale AR platform for everyone. The engine will include augmented reality headsets, headphones, smartphones, and smart glasses, with a possibility of automated [[Courses and Training]]s being generated based on physical rooms. [Click here](https://mixed-news.com/en/meta-introduces-ar-engine-to-build-a-large-scale-ar-platform-for-everyone/) to read more.
